lines.speaker: Macklin
lines.text: Cap, the situation is NOT GOOD at all. The whole city is either going to fall out of the sky or become uninhabitable in the next 46 minutes or so.

lines.speaker: Captain Dwyer
lines.text: Are you serious?! Macklin, this isn’t good!

lines.speaker: Macklin
lines.text: Tell me something I don’t know, Cap.

lines.speaker: Captain Dwyer
lines.text: Macklin, I don’t know any other way around this. You need to get to the maintenance levels that are malfunctioning and figure out what in the hell is going on down there!

lines.speaker: Macklin
lines.text: Me? Cap I haven’t been down to the maintenance levels since I retired. It’s dangerous for me nowadays, I don’t know if my body can even handle it.

lines.speaker: Captain Dwyer
lines.text: Look Macklin, you’re the only detective I can get a hold of right now, and you’re the only person I know with experience as a mechanic. It’s either you get down there, or the whole city dies!

lines.speaker: Macklin
lines.text: Ugh, sometimes I wonder why I even took this job... Alright, I’ll go check it out, but I’m not looking forward to this...
